## Goal
- Add `useEventLogger` argument parameter to audit factory functions across the entire repository (NewAuditFormatter, NewAuditFormatterWriter, NoopAuditFactory)

## Constraints & Preferences
- Make the change across the whole repository
- The project must still typecheck after changes
- Update all callers of these factory functions

## Progress
### Done
- Identify key audit factory functions requiring modification:
  - `NewAuditFormatter` in `github.com/hashicorp/vault/audit/format.go:102`
  - `NewAuditFormatterWriter` in `github.com/hashicorp/vault/audit/format.go:111`
  - `NoopAuditFactory` in `github.com/hashicorp/vault/helper/testhelpers/corehelpers/corehelpers.go:264`
- Create TODO list for tracking implementation

### In Progress
- Understanding context and structure of audit package to implement useEventLogger parameter

### Blocked
- (none)

## Key Decisions
- Focus on three main factory functions identified through inspection queries

## Next Steps
1. Add useEventLogger parameter to NewAuditFormatter function signature
2. Add useEventLogger parameter to NewAuditFormatterWriter function signature
3. Add useEventLogger parameter to NoopAuditFactory function signature
4. Search and update all callers across the repository
5. Run typecheck to verify project still compiles

## Critical Context
- Factory interface: `type Factory func(context.Context, *BackendConfig) (Backend, error)`
- AuditFormatter structure contains a Salter field
- NoopAuditFactory returns `github.com/hashicorp/vault/audit.Factory`

part.text:
---
## Goal
- Add `useEventLogger` argument parameter to `NewAuditFormatter`, `NewAuditFormatterWriter`, and related audit factory functions across the entire repository

## Constraints & Preferences
- Make the change across the whole repository
- The project must still typecheck after changes
- Update all callers of these factory functions

## Progress
### Done
- Identified 12 callers of `NewAuditFormatter` across packages:
  - `github.com/hashicorp/vault/audit.NewTemporaryFormatter`
  - `github.com/hashicorp/vault/builtin/audit/file.Factory`
  - `github.com/hashicorp/vault/builtin/audit/socket.Factory`
  - `github.com/hashicorp/vault/builtin/audit/syslog.Factory`
  - `github.com/hashicorp/vault/helper/testhelpers/corehelpers.NewNoopAudit`
- Identified 5 callers of `NewAuditFormatterWriter` across packages (file, socket, syslog backends)
- Modified `github.com/hashicorp/vault/audit.AuditFormatter` struct to add `useEventLogger bool` field
- Updated `github.com/hashicorp/vault/audit.NewAuditFormatter` signature from `(salter Salter)` to `(salter Salter, useEventLogger bool)`

### In Progress
- Updating all callers of `NewAuditFormatter` and `NewAuditFormatterWriter` across the repository
- Modifying `NewTemporaryFormatter` to pass `useEventLogger` default value

### Blocked
- (none)

## Key Decisions
- Add `useEventLogger bool` parameter as second argument to `NewAuditFormatter`
- Default value should be `false` for existing callers maintaining backward compatibility
- All internal/observability event package formatters likely pass this through their respective functions

## Next Steps
1. Update `github.com/hashicorp/vault/audit.NewTemporaryFormatter` to pass `useEventLogger: false` argument
2. Update all builtin audit backend Factory functions (file, socket, syslog) to pass the new parameter
3. Update `github.com/hashicorp/vault/helper/testhelpers/corehelpers.NewNoopAudit` to pass the new parameter
4. Address callers in internal tests (`format_json_test.go`, `format_jsonx_test.go`, etc.)
5. Run typecheck to verify project compiles across all updated packages

## Critical Context
- Error: "not enough arguments in call to NewAuditFormatter\n\thave (Salter)\n\twant (Salter, bool)"
- Error: "unknown field useEventLogger in struct literal of type AuditFormatter" → now resolved after struct update
- `NewTemporaryFormatter` ignores error from `NewAuditFormatter`, so will accept added parameter

## Relevant Files
```
/private/var/folders/9f/txt0j2rs2rs2wx3lqx9vfj9x3240000gn/T/BenchmarkRenameqwen3.5-9b-udq4vault_7103bc2csemantic2779552280
├── vault/audit/format.go (Added useEventLogger field to AuditFormatter, updated NewAuditFormatter signature)
├── vault/builtin/audit/file/backend.go (Factory calls NewAuditFormatter/NewAuditFormatterWriter)
├── vault/builtin/audit/socket/backend.go (Factory calls NewAuditFormatter/NewAuditFormatterWriter)
├── vault/builtin/audit/syslog/backend.go (Factory calls NewAuditFormatter/NewAuditFormatterWriter)
├── vault/helper/testhelpers/corehelpers/corehelpers.go (NewNoopAudit calls both functions)
└── vault/internal/observability/event/* (Multiple JSON formatter variants call these functions directly)
```

---
## Goal
- Add `useEventLogger` argument parameter to `NewAuditFormatter`, `NewAuditFormatterWriter`, and related audit factory functions across the entire repository

## Constraints & Preferences
- Make the change across the whole repository
- The project must still typecheck after changes
- Update all callers of these factory functions

## Progress
### Done
- Identified 12 callers of `NewAuditFormatter` across packages:
  - `github.com/hashicorp/vault/audit.NewTemporaryFormatter`
  - `github.com/hashicorp/vault/builtin/audit/file.Factory`
  - `github.com/hashicorp/vault/builtin/audit/socket.Factory`
  - `github.com/hashicorp/vault/builtin/audit/syslog.Factory`
  - `github.com/hashicorp/vault/helper/testhelpers/corehelpers.NewNoopAudit`
- Identified 5 callers of `NewAuditFormatterWriter` across packages (file, socket, syslog backends)
- Modified `github.com/hashicorp/vault/audit.AuditFormatter` struct to add `useEventLogger bool` field
- Updated `github.com/hashicorp/vault/audit.NewAuditFormatter` signature from `(salter Salter)` to `(salter Salter, useEventLogger bool)`
- Updated `github.com/hashicorp/vault/audit.NewAuditFormatterWriter` signature to add `useEventLogger bool` parameter

### In Progress
- Updating all callers of `NewAuditFormatter` and `NewAuditFormatterWriter` across the repository
- Diagnostic errors showing ~14 caller locations for `NewAuditFormatter` needing updates with default value
- Diagnostic errors showing ~17 caller locations for `NewAuditFormatterWriter` needing updates with default value

### Blocked
- (none)

## Key Decisions
- Add `useEventLogger bool` parameter as second argument to `NewAuditFormatter`
- Add `useEventLogger bool` parameter to `NewAuditFormatterWriter`
- Default value should be `false` for existing callers maintaining backward compatibility

## Next Steps
1. Update all builtin audit backend Factory functions (file, socket, syslog) to pass the new parameter with `false` default
2. Update `github.com/hashicorp/vault/audit.NewTemporaryFormatter` to pass both parameters with `false` defaults  
3. Update `github.com/hashicorp/vault/helper/testhelpers/corehelpers.NewNoopAudit` to pass the new parameters
4. Address callers in internal tests (`format_json_test.go`:101, `format_jsonx_test.go`:116, etc.) where NewAuditFormatter is called
5. Address callers in builtin audit backends (file:backend.go:23, socket:backend.go:22, syslog:backend.go:19) 
6. Run typecheck to verify project compiles across all updated packages

- Error: "not enough arguments in call to NewAuditFormatterWriter\n\thave (*audit.AuditFormatter, audit.Writer)\n\twant (audit.Formatter, audit.Writer, bool)"

- NewSignature: `func NewAuditFormatterWriter(formatter Formatter, writer Writer, useEventLogger bool) (*AuditFormatterWriter, error)`
